description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed from horizontally stacked, rounded wooden logs with visible notched corners. The roof is a simple gable style, covered with rectangular wooden shingles and features a prominent metal chimney pipe extending upward. The cabin has two windows with wooden frames and shutters, one of which is open, and a single wooden door that is also open, revealing a wooden floor inside. Lantern-style exterior lights are mounted on either side of the door, adding to the traditional aesthetic. The structure sits directly on the ground with no visible foundation or porch. The overall appearance is sturdy and functional, evoking a classic woodland or park setting.
description: A sturdy log cabin with a gable shingle roof, open door, shuttered windows, and lantern lights, built from rounded wooden logs.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open wooden door, two lantern lights, and a partially open window with shutters.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the chimney pipe on the roof and the log construction, with the door and lanterns visible on the side.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the closed side of the cabin, the chimney, and a single window with shutters.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying both windows (one open, one closed), the open door, and a lantern light near the corner.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in rectangular wooden shingles, featuring a single metal chimney pipe
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows with wooden frames and shutters, asymmetrically placed on adjacent walls; one window is open, the other closed
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door located on the front facade, offset to the left, flanked by lantern lights
